name: comp-jco-vet-clinic-redis
description: The vet-clinic app with a durable Redis-backed KV store — same components, persistent across restarts

scripts.prep: cd ../jco-vet-clinic && npm install && npm run transpile
scripts.start: npm run prep && VET_KV_BACKEND=redis VET_KV_BACKEND_MODULE="$PWD/kv-backend.js" PORT=${PORT:-3002} tsx ../jco-vet-clinic/src/server.ts
